mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_graph_template ( id, agent_profile_id, template_key, version, name, intent_tags_json, graph_json, checksum, status ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{agentProfileId}, #{templateKey}, #{version}, #{name}, CAST(#{intentLabelsJson} AS JSON), CAST(#{graphJson} AS JSON), #{checksum}, 'ACTIVE' )
mapper.sql: BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, agent_profile_id AS agentProfileId, template_key AS templateKey, version, name, CAST(intent_tags_json AS CHAR) AS intentLabelsJson, CAST(graph_json AS CHAR) AS graphJson, checksum, status, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM task_graph_template WHERE agent_profile_id = #{agentProfileId} ORDER BY template_key, version DESC
SELECT FROM task_graph_template WHERE agent_profile_id = #{agentProfileId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY template_key
